title: 20pcs Christmas Glitter Leaves Picks, Xmas Glitter Foliage Decor, Gold Christmas Tree Decorations, Artificial Leaves Stem Xmas Ornaments for Wreath Tree Garland Decorations

Dimensions: 20PCS Christmas Glitter Leaves measure 21cm in length and 11cm in width, perfectly suited for decorating Christmas trees, christmas garland, wreaths, vases, Christmas cards, gift boxes and other festive settings
DIY Christmas Tree Decorations: Flexible Christmas tree feathers require no tools and can be shaped freely; Simply wrap them around the tree trunk to create exquisite festive decorations
Reusable: Artificial Christmas tree pine needles are durable and reusable, making them easy to store and space-saving; Twig christmas tree can also be placed in a vase as home décor

Exceptional Christmas Gift: The golden christmas flowers artificial design exudes elegance, complementing most indoor Christmas displays; An ideal present for festive occasions or everyday gifting to loved ones, creating cherished memories
